name: Alexandru Negoita
bio:
Hi, I’m Alexandru Negoiță, a Stockholm-based concept artist and illustrator with 20 years of experience in the video game industry. I’ve worked as an art director and lead concept artist, creating a wide range of game art for established studios, with a strong foundation and the ability to adapt to diverse visual styles.

I specialize in world-building, visual development, concept art, and art direction, as well as in creating cinematic key art and iconic imagery that defines the brand and narrative of world-class video games. 

In 2019, I co-founded Shardstone Assembly and published  Scavenger, an original D&D campaign sourcebook. My illustration work has been published internationally in Spectrum, Exposé, ImagineFX and EDGE.

experience.title: Co-creator of the Scavenger and Sküllbox IPs, worldbuilding, concept art, illustration, visual dev, layout design, art direction, and social media.
Senior Concept Artist (2018 - 2023)
experience.projects: ○ Demeo X Dungeons & Dragons: Battlemarked   ○ Demeo: Reign of Madness   ○ Demeo Battles

publications.title: Spectrum 30: The Best in Contemporary Fantastic Art (2024)
